title: Data type changes when arithmetic in prepared statements.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE nums ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT CHECK (value >= 0) );
CREATE TABLE mixed ( id SERIAL, text_value VARCHAR(50), float_value FLOAT );
SELECT id, value, (value - 5) AS adjusted_value FROM nums WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Arithmetic operation in prepared statements alters data type.
